notes: Both with and without skill produce identical results -- 8/9 pass, same failure (missing langcode in config/install YAML)
The langcode expectation catches a real gap -- neither version includes it, but Drupal auto-adds it on install
Config storage patterns (ConfigFormBase, config/install, config/schema) are well-known to Sonnet baseline
With-skill version used custom permission 'administer site announcements'; baseline used standard 'administer site configuration'
Both produced E2E-verified working config forms that correctly reflect config:set changes
